description: Optimizely provides digital experience, experimentation, and customer data products for managing content, running experiments, and activating customer data. Its product documentation covers separate APIs for web experimentation, Optimizely Graph, data platform workflows, and experimentation data export.
summary: Optimizely exposes multiple developer surfaces including Web Experimentation REST APIs, Optimizely Data Platform REST and GraphQL APIs, an Optimizely Graph GraphQL API, the Experimentation Data credential-exchange API, and the `oevents` CLI.
